title: Durian Furniture South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Durian Furniture South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Durian Furniture South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Durian Furniture South Asia Partners:
Durian Furniture South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture South Asia Partners!
